title: from: fix isolation option
body:
Add the isolation option to the from command.

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body: @q384566678 nice catch and fix.  Can you also update the `./contrib/completions/bash/buildah` file and add isolation to the options under from too please?
@q384566678 Are you able to update the PR, or should I just merge and wait for a second PR?
Ok I am going to merge so we can release buildah 1.4 with this feature.  @q384566678 Please open another PR so we can get the bash completions.

:pushpin: Commit 1d4a208 has been approved by `rhatdan`
